data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding Q&A and poll response linkage.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the linkage between Q&A and poll responses to attendees/sessions. However, the prior evidence does not provide any concrete data or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of these features. The linked use case mentions the need for these capabilities, but without corresponding evidence, the validation cannot be completed.
gaps: No evidence of live engagement event capture mechanisms such as Q&A or polls.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
